news.title: YXC Expands Automotive Crystal Product Line with New AEC-Q200 Grade 0 Devices
news.titleCn: 扬兴科技扩展车规级产品线，推出AEC-Q200 Grade 0新品
news.summary: YXC announces expansion of automotive-grade crystal product line with new AEC-Q200 Grade 0 qualified devices for extreme temperature applications up to 150C.
news.content: Shenzhen, China - YXC (Yangxing Technology), a leading manufacturer of frequency control products, today announced the expansion of its automotive-grade crystal product line with new AEC-Q200 Grade 0 qualified devices. These new products are designed for extreme temperature applications, supporting operating temperatures from -50C to +150C. The new Grade 0 product line includes crystal resonators and oscillators in various package sizes from 2.0x1.6mm to 5.0x3.2mm, with frequencies ranging from 8MHz to 54MHz. All products have undergone rigorous AEC-Q200 qualification testing including temperature cycling, mechanical shock, vibration, and EMC testing. With the increasing electronic content in modern vehicles, especially in electric vehicles, there is growing demand for timing components that can operate reliably in extreme environments. Our new Grade 0 products meet this demand while maintaining the cost-effectiveness our customers expect. Key features of the new Grade 0 products include: Extended temperature range: -50C to +150C, Enhanced shock resistance: 5000g, 0.3ms half-sine, Vibration resistance: 20g RMS, 20-2000Hz, Full PPAP documentation support, Complete traceability and change control. The products are immediately available for sampling with production quantities available in 6-8 weeks. YXC also provides comprehensive technical support including application notes, layout guides, and reference designs.

news.title: YXC Launches QuickTurn Programmable Oscillator Series with 1-210MHz Range
news.titleCn: 扬兴科技推出QuickTurn可编程晶振系列，覆盖1-210MHz频率范围
news.summary: New QuickTurn programmable oscillators enable any frequency from 1MHz to 210MHz with 2-3 week delivery, eliminating long lead times for custom frequencies.
news.content: Shenzhen, China - YXC has launched its new QuickTurn programmable oscillator series, offering engineers unprecedented flexibility in timing component selection. The YXO-P series supports any frequency from 1MHz to 210MHz with delivery in just 2-3 weeks, eliminating the traditional 12-16 week lead times for custom frequency oscillators. The programmable oscillators are available with CMOS, LVDS, or LVPECL outputs and support multiple supply voltages (1.8V, 2.5V, 3.3V). All devices feature excellent jitter performance (less than 1ps RMS for CMOS, less than 0.3ps RMS for differential) and frequency stability of ±25ppm. Engineers often face challenges when they need a specific frequency that is not available as a standard part. Our QuickTurn program eliminates this problem by allowing any frequency within our range with no minimum order quantity for programming. The programming service is available through YXC's global distribution partners as well as directly from YXC. Customers can specify their exact frequency requirements and receive programmed samples within 2-3 weeks, with production quantities following shortly after approval.

news.title: YXC Introduces Ultra-Low Jitter Differential Oscillators for 5G Infrastructure
news.titleCn: 扬兴科技推出超低抖动差分晶振，面向5G基础设施应用
news.summary: New YXO-D series differential oscillators deliver sub-0.3ps RMS jitter and -145dBc/Hz phase noise, meeting demanding 5G base station requirements at competitive pricing.
news.content: Shenzhen, China - YXC has introduced its new YXO-D series of differential output crystal oscillators, designed specifically for high-performance applications including 5G base stations, high-speed networking, and data center equipment. The new oscillators deliver exceptional jitter performance of less than 0.3ps RMS and phase noise of -145dBc/Hz at 1MHz offset. The YXO-D series is available with LVDS, LVPECL, or HCSL outputs and supports frequencies from 10MHz to 210MHz. Key frequencies for 5G applications including 122.88MHz, 156.25MHz, and 184.32MHz are available from stock. 5G infrastructure demands timing components with exceptional jitter and phase noise performance. Our new differential oscillators meet these demanding specifications while offering significant cost savings compared to traditional high-performance timing suppliers.

news.title: YXC Releases Ultra-Low Power 32.768kHz Crystal Series for IoT Applications
news.titleCn: 扬兴科技发布超低功耗32.768kHz晶振系列，面向物联网应用
news.summary: New YXC-32K-LP series tuning fork crystals optimized for sub-0.5uA RTC operation, enabling 10+ year battery life in IoT devices.
news.content: Shenzhen, China - YXC has released its new YXC-32K-LP series of ultra-low power 32.768kHz tuning fork crystals, specifically optimized for battery-powered IoT applications. The new crystals feature ultra-low ESR and optimized electrode design to minimize power consumption in RTC circuits. The YXC-32K-LP series achieves typical RTC current consumption of less than 0.5uA when paired with modern low-power MCUs, enabling 10+ year battery life in smart meters, sensors, and wearable devices. Battery life is a critical concern for IoT device designers. Our new low-power series helps engineers achieve their power budgets while maintaining excellent frequency stability and reliability.

news.title: YXC Receives IATF 16949 Certification for Automotive Quality Management
news.titleCn: 扬兴科技获得IATF 16949汽车质量管理体系认证
news.summary: YXC achieves IATF 16949:2016 certification, demonstrating commitment to automotive quality standards and strengthening position in automotive timing market.
news.content: Shenzhen, China - YXC (Yangxing Technology) is pleased to announce that it has received IATF 16949:2016 certification for its quality management system. This internationally recognized standard for automotive quality management demonstrates YXC's commitment to meeting the stringent quality requirements of the automotive industry. The IATF 16949 certification was awarded following a comprehensive audit of YXC's manufacturing facilities, quality management systems, and processes. The certification covers the design and manufacture of crystal resonators and oscillators for automotive applications. IATF 16949 certification is a significant milestone for YXC. It validates our quality management systems and opens doors to new opportunities with major automotive OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers who require this certification.
